_description: Philosophical tradition weights for scoring dome domains. Each tradition assigns weights (0-1) to each of the 12 dome domains, expressing what that tradition considers most essential to human flourishing. The assembler scores each dome through each tradition: tradition_score = sum(domain_score * weight) / sum(weights).

_sources.nussbaum: Nussbaum, M. (2011). Creating Capabilities. Harvard UP.
_sources.sen: Sen, A. (1999). Development as Freedom. Knopf.
_sources.oecd: OECD (2020). How's Life? Measuring Well-being. OECD Publishing.
_sources.gnh: Centre for Bhutan & GNH Studies. GNH Index methodology.
_sources.maslow: Maslow, A. (1943). A Theory of Human Motivation. Psychological Review.
_sources.ubuntu: Metz, T. (2007). Toward an African Moral Theory. Journal of Political Philosophy.
_sources.buddhist: Payutto, P.A. (1994). Buddhist Economics. Buddhadhamma Foundation.
_sources.indigenous: Kimmerer, R.W. (2013). Braiding Sweetgrass. Milkweed Editions.

nussbaum.name: Nussbaum's Central Capabilities
nussbaum.principle: Ten capabilities a just society must secure at a threshold level for all

sen.name: Sen's Capability Approach
sen.principle: Expand real freedoms; no fixed list — capabilities emerge from democratic deliberation

oecd.name: OECD Better Life Index
oecd.principle: 11 measurable dimensions of well-being; US high on income, low on health and safety

gnh.name: Gross National Happiness (Bhutan)
gnh.principle: Sufficiency across 6+ of 9 domains makes a person happy; policy should expand breadth

maslow.name: Maslow's Hierarchy (Extended for Systems Design)
maslow.principle: Lower needs must be met before higher ones become accessible; weakest link matters

ubuntu.name: Ubuntu Ethics
ubuntu.principle: I am because we are — a person is a person through other persons; flourishing is communal

buddhist.name: Buddhist Economics
buddhist.principle: Maximize well-being while minimizing consumption; sufficiency over accumulation

indigenous.name: Indigenous Relational Worldview
indigenous.principle: All beings are related; health of land, water, community are inseparable from human health
